channel.title: AiNFL GM
channel.description: AI-Powered NFL Offseason Simulator - Manage any team's salary cap, sign free agents, make trades, and run a full mock draft.

item.title: AiNFL GM: Full 2026 Offseason Simulator
item.description: Manage any NFL team's 2026 offseason. Real salary cap numbers, free agent signings, trades, and a full 7-round mock draft with AI opponents. Free, no signup required.

item.title: Mock Draft: Run All 7 Rounds
item.description: Run a complete 7-round NFL mock draft for any team. Trade up, trade down, or let the board come to you. AI handles every other team's picks.

item.title: Salary Cap Tracker: Real 2026 Numbers
item.description: See every team's real 2026 salary cap space. Cut players, restructure contracts, and clear cap room for free agency and the draft.

item.title: Free Agency Simulator
item.description: Browse the full 2026 NFL free agent class and sign players to your team with realistic contracts. Watch your cap space update in real time.

item.title: Trade Engine: Swap Picks and Players
item.description: Use AiNFL GM's trade engine to move up in the draft, dump bad contracts, or acquire star players from other teams.

item.title: AI-Powered Roster Suggestions
item.description: Not sure who to draft or sign? AiNFL GM's AI analyzes your team's roster needs and recommends the best moves for your offseason.
